channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Super Bowl stars Josh Sweat and Milton Williams headline a list of NFL free agents
item.description: NFL teams can start reshaping their rosters by signing free agents this week. There’s plenty of attention on the quarterbacks, including Sam Darnold, Russell Wilson and Justin Fields.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russell Henley with a late charge and a big eagle wins Bay Hill for biggest career win
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Russell Henley delivered a late charge that would have made Arnold Palmer proud, capped off by chipping in for eagle on the 16th hole to rally with a 2-under 70 at Bay Hill on Sunday for the biggest victory of his career.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bowling Green hires former NFL star running back Eddie George as coach
item.description: Bowling Green hired former NFL running back and Tennessee State coach Eddie George as the Falcons’ head coach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 40 as Thunder top Nuggets 127-103 in matchup of West leaders
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 40 points and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Denver Nuggets 127-103 on Sunday in a matchup between the top two teams in the Western Conference.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Luke Loucks returning to Florida State to take over as Seminoles coach
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Luke Loucks is returning to Florida State to take over as the coach of the Seminoles. Florida State announced the hire on Sunday. The 34-year-old Loucks is replacing Leonard Hamilton, who is stepping down at the end of this season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Premier League Summer Series returns to MetLife Stadium
item.description: NEW JERSEY (PIX11) -- Soccer fans rejoice! Four Premier League teams are headed to the United States this summer to compete in the second edition of the Summer Series, a tournament held at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, Soldier Field in Chicago, and the Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, PIX 11

item.title: No. 11 Duke takes over after halftime to beat No. 7 NC State 76-62, win 1st ACC title since 2013
item.description: GREENSBORO, N.C. (AP) — Oluchi Okananwa had 22 points and 10 rebounds to help No. 11 Duke rally from a 14-point deficit to beat No. 7 N.C. State 76-62 on Sunday for the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament title.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 8 Michigan State tops No. 17 Michigan 79-62, winning the 18-school Big Ten title by 3 games
item.description: EAST LANSING, Mich. (AP) — Tre Holloman scored a career-high 20 points, Jase Richardson had 18 points and No. 8 Michigan State beat No. 17 Michigan 79-62 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Andrew Tate, social media influencer who faces trafficking charges, sits cageside for UFC 313
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Former kickboxer and controversial internet personality Andrew Tate was cageside for UFC 313 inside T-Mobile Arena on Saturday night, one night after attending Dana White’s Power Slap 12 at Fontainebleau Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NC State fires coach Kevin Keatts a year after improbable ACC title and Final Four run
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — It was less than a year ago that Kevin Keatts and N.C. State took over March, taking a wild ride to the program's first Atlantic Coast Conference title in nearly 38 years followed by an improbable run to its first Final Four in even longer.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes the highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history at $40 million per year
item.description: Myles Garrett is staying in Cleveland after the Browns gave him a record four-year contract extension that makes the four-time All-Pro edge rusher the highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bills release Von Miller in salary cap-saving move: Report
item.description: The move frees up at least $8.4 million in salary cap space, which comes close to matching how much the team was projected to be over the limit.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: LeBron James has 'not much concern' after exiting loss to Celtics with late groin injury
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — LeBron James didn't sound overly concerned after straining his groin in the waning minutes of Los Angeles' 111-101 loss to Boston on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Duke's Maliq Brown stood out at UNC. It showed his importance to the No. 2 Blue Devils' title hopes
item.description: CHAPEL HILL, N.C. (AP) — Maliq Brown hadn't played for the better part of three weeks for second-ranked Duke, a shoulder injury sidelining him just as the season made a hard turn into the stretch run.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tatum scores 40, Celtics beat Lakers 111-101 after James leaves late with groin injury
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Jayson Tatum had 40 points, 12 rebounds, and eight assists, and the Boston Celtics held off a late rally to beat the Los Angeles Lakers 111-101 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy released after Texas district attorney declines to pursue charges
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Xavier Worthy was released Saturday after a district attorney in Texas declined to pursue charges against the Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver following an arrest in which he had been accused of felony domestic violence.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Baseball: Santa Fe Christian 3. Valhalla 2
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Baseball first game of the season for Santa Fe Christian who won a low scoring game against Valhalla 3-2. Eagles were paced by sophomore Kyle Plasman, young man was on a good one out the gate, 3 for 4 with three doubles. A fantastic pitching performance by senior Kam Lohse.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
